title: Guarulhos, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Guarulhos, SP: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Guarulhos is a city in SP with a population of 1,392,121. São Paulo’s largest suburb and home to Brazil’s busiest international airport, a major industrial and logistics center.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
